title: PublicationReceipt
description: Forge state + operations performed (ADR-0016 §3, ADR-0017 §7 Reconcile): records what was actually written to the forge (thread/approval/merge, target ids, timestamps) for reconciliation/debugging. Carries no secrets, no raw policy expressions, and no user-controlled Markdown — additionalProperties: false leaves no field for any of those.

targetId.description: Forge-assigned id of the thread/approval/merge operation performed.
